rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH SCOTT VS. KRISHNA HOTEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday May 13, 2022, line 1. Motion For Summary Judgment. OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Settlement on file. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ELIZABETH TAGUA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment; Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday May 13, 2022, line 6. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH TAGUA, CESAR MARTINEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant provides facts to show that Plaintiff did not strictly comply with statutory requirements for Notice, and therefore did not establish the required elements of their UD cause of action. Defendant shifts the burden to Plaintiff to show that there is a triable issue of fact. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: CALLAN REALTY VS. WILLI'S COFFEE & FLOWERS LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Jennifer Callan Desler, Co-Trustee, In Place Of Callan Realty As Plaintiff Pursuant To Ccp Sec 473; Declaration Of Jennifer Callan Desler; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday May 13, 2022, line 8. 3-PLAINTIFF CALLAN REALTY Plaintiff'S Motion To Substitute Jennifer Callan Desler, Co-Trustee, In Place Of Callan Realty As Plaintiff Pursuant To Ccp Sec 473. Hearing Required. No later than 8:30 a.m. on May 13, 2022 Plaintiff to file and serve (by electronic service) evidence showing that (1) Trust is the owner of the property, e.g. a copy of recorded Grant Deed; current Schedule of Trust Assets, etc; and (2) trust document/amendments, etc. identifying current co-trustees; and (3) trust document specifying that one co-trustee is authorized to file an unlawful detainer without joining/or express authorization of other co-trustees. All provisions of the trust that are not responsive to the points above may be redacted. Courtesy copy of the filing to be hand-delivered to department 501 no later than 9:00 a.m. on May 13, 2022. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE LIVING, LLC VS. ANDREW "RAIN" GIOVANNI BANKS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday May 13, 2022, line 12. DEFENDANT ANDREW "RAIN" GIOVANNI BANKS Notice Of Motion For Reclassification. DENIED without prejudice to be brought before the trial judge at the conclusion of trial. Given the current trial date of May 19, 2022 it appears probable that $25,000 mark will not be reached; however, at this time, and given the events of the past 2 years, at this point the determination that recovery of $25,000 is virtually unattainable to a legal certainty cannot be made. (The Court notes that this motion was first submitted for filing on April 18, 2022 and was rejected due to what appears to be a scrivener's error by defense counsel). Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.= (501/CFH)
